data.name: Untamed Lust
data.detailed_description:
Untamed Lust 是一款僅限成人的視覺小說，適合 18 歲及以上的玩家。

你可以選擇扮演以下三個角色之一：

  • 阿克塞爾，一位冷酷無情、專橫跋扈的軍隊指揮官。他傲慢且渴望權力，利用自己的地位和原始魅力來引誘他手下的女性，包括護士和秘書。隨著他的性行為不斷升級，阿克塞爾的秘密事務變成了一場危險的公共權力遊戲，在士兵面前表演，以證明他的雄性領袖地位。

  • 伊莎貝拉，一位意志堅強、美麗的舞者，即將離開她意志薄弱的男友科迪。

科迪，伊莎貝拉矛盾的男友。

隨著他不當行為的消息傳開，官員們發起了秘密行動逮捕他。然而，阿克塞爾領先了一步。在一位戀人的幫助下，他成功逃脫，逃到了一片偏遠、未開化的森林。

同時，一群年輕朋友冒險進入同一片荒野。伊莎貝拉和科迪加入了他們的朋友瓦萊麗和女性化的 LGBTQ 角色托比。他們不知道逃亡指揮官現在住在森林深處。

在森林裡，阿克塞爾和四個朋友的道路發生了碰撞。 Untamed Lust 是一個關於生存和性的故事，有多個分支路徑和結果。你所做的選擇將決定這些角色的命運，並導致各種親密的遭遇，包括 LGBTQ 場景。

每個選擇都提供了一段獨特的旅程，穿越一個關於慾望、背叛和野性慾望的故事。

data.short_description: 《Untamed Lust》是一部由你掌控的成人視覺小說。選擇你的角色，引導一個關於權力和秘密的充滿激​​情的故事，做出導致不同親密遭遇和結果的決定。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (SP1+) 或更高版本
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz 雙核心 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 相容於 OpenGL 2.0 和 DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 相容音效卡
  • 備註: 在 32 位元和 64 位元系統上運行
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • 備註: Recommended for a smoother experience at 1080p resolutions and higher.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) 或更高版本
  • 處理器: 英特爾或蘋果矽 CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 相容圖形
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 不適用
  • 備註: 需要 64 位元處理器和作業系統。
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or newer
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5 or newer
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal compatible graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/a
  • 備註: Recommended for native performance on Apple Silicon and a smoother experience.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+、SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz 雙核心 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 相容圖形
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 相容於 ALSA 或 PulseAudio
  • 備註: 需要 64 位元處理器和作業系統。
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+, SteamOS 3.x
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB VRAM (NVIDIA/AMD)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ALSA or PulseAudio compatible
  • 備註: Recommended for a smooth experience. Fully compatible with Steam Deck.

data.name: Untamed Lust
data.detailed_description:
Untamed Lust is an adult-only visual novel for players 18 and older.

You can choose to play as one of three characters:

  • Axel, a ruthless and domineering army commander. Arrogant and power-hungry, he uses his position and raw charisma to seduce the women under his command, including nurses and secretaries. As his sexual exploits escalate, Axel’s secret affairs turn into a dangerous game of public power plays, performed in front of his soldiers to prove his alpha male status.

  • Isabella, a strong-willed and beautiful dancer, who is on the verge of leaving her weak-willed boyfriend, Cody.

Cody, Isabella's conflicted boyfriend.

As word of his misconduct spreads, officials launch a secret operation to arrest him. Axel, however, is one step ahead. With the help of one of his lovers, he manages to escape and flees to a remote, untamed forest.

Meanwhile, a group of young friends ventures into the same wilderness. Isabella and Cody are joined by their friends Valerie and the effeminate Tobey, an LGBTQ character. They are unaware of the fugitive commander now living in the depths of the forest.

In the forest, the paths of Axel and the four friends collide. Untamed Lust is a story of survival and sexuality, with multiple branching paths and outcomes. The choices you make will determine the fate of these characters and lead to a variety of intimate encounters, including LGBTQ scenes.

Each choice offers a unique journey through a tale of desire, betrayal, and untamed lust.

data.short_description: Untamed Lust is an adult visual novel where you're in control. Choose your character and steer a passionate story of power and secrets, making decisions that lead to different intimate encounters and outcomes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 (SP1+) or newer
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 & DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • Additional Notes: Runs on 32-bit and 64-bit systems
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or newer
  • Processor: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • Additional Notes: Recommended for a smoother experience at 1080p resolutions and higher.

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) or newer
  • Processor: Intel or Apple Silicon CPU
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible graphics
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: N/A
  • Additional Notes: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
mac_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or newer
  • Processor: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5 or newer
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Metal compatible graphics
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: N/a
  • Additional Notes: Recommended for native performance on Apple Silicon and a smoother experience.

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 18.04+, SteamOS
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 compatible graphics
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: ALSA or PulseAudio compatible
  • Additional Notes: Requires 64-bit processor and operating system.
linux_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Ubuntu 20.04+, SteamOS 3.x
  • Processor: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core CPU or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated graphics card with 1GB VRAM (NVIDIA/AMD)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: ALSA or PulseAudio compatible
  • Additional Notes: Recommended for a smooth experience. Fully compatible with Steam Deck.
